channel.title: Lazy Cat – dev blog
channel.description: Code by day, blog by night. Join me on my backend journey as we learn and grow together.

item.title: Kafka Series (6): 5 Production Use Cases & Configs
item.description: 5 production use cases với configs chi tiết - High Throughput, Low Latency, Exactly-Once, Event Sourcing, CDC. Kèm consumer stability guide và config cheat sheet.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)
